HSC Technology Group Ltd. ( (AU:TAL) ) has shared an announcement.

HSC Technology Group Ltd. announced a change in the director’s interest notice for Graham Russell. The change involves the cancellation of 120,000 unlisted performance rights, which impacts the director’s indirect interests in the company. This update reflects the company’s compliance with ASX listing rules and provides transparency to stakeholders about changes in director interests.

Kangji Medical Holdings Limited ( (HK:9997) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Kangji Medical Holdings Limited has announced a trading halt of its shares on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, effective from July 18, 2025. This halt is pending the release of an announcement concerning inside information, which could have implications for the company’s operations and its stakeholders.

Fletcher Building Limited ( (FRCEF) ) has issued an update.

Fletcher Building Limited announced a correction to its Quarterly Volume Reporting table, specifically addressing an error in the Residential volume figures which were initially reported as indexed volumes instead of raw data. This correction ensures consistency with previous disclosures and provides stakeholders with accurate data, which is crucial for maintaining transparency and trust in the company’s financial reporting.

More about Fletcher Building Limited

Fletcher Building Limited is a prominent company in the construction and building materials industry, primarily offering products such as wallboards, laminates, glasswool, plastic pipes, steel, and concrete. The company operates in New Zealand and Australia, focusing on both domestic and commercial markets.

data.title: Connected Minerals Reports Promising Drilling Results and Project Expansion
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

The latest update is out from Connected IO ( (AU:CML) ).

Connected Minerals Limited has completed a successful maiden drilling program at the Ondapanda Prospect in Namibia, revealing promising uranium grades in 14 out of 15 holes. The results suggest geological similarities to the world-class Etango Uranium Project, enhancing the company’s strategic positioning in Namibia’s prolific uranium province. In Australia, the company is expanding its Pallingup Project, with plans to explore potential REE deposits identified through aeromagnetic surveys, contingent on securing land access agreements.

More about Connected IO

Connected Minerals Limited (ASX: CML) operates in the mining industry, focusing on uranium and rare earth elements (REE) exploration. The company holds strategic land positions in Namibia, known for its uranium production, and Australia, where it is exploring for REE and heavy minerals.

Average Trading Volume: 65,082

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$8.16M

data.title: Future Fuels Inc. Launches $1.5 Million Private Placement and Expands Marketing Efforts
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

Saville Resources ( (TSE:FTUR) ) has shared an update.

Future Fuels Inc. has announced a non-brokered private placement aiming to raise $1.5 million through the issuance of up to 3,750,000 units, each comprising one common share and one warrant. The proceeds will support corporate activities and the advancement of the Hornby Uranium Project. Additionally, the company has increased its budget for online marketing services with MCS Market Communication Service GmbH, reflecting an effort to enhance its market presence.

More about Saville Resources

Future Fuels Inc. is focused on the exploration and development of uranium resources, with its principal asset being the Hornby Uranium Project in north-western Nunavut. The company also holds the Covette Property in Quebec’s James Bay region, indicating a focus on mineral exploration in geologically promising areas.

Tokyo Keiki ( (JP:7721) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Tokyo Keiki Inc. has completed the payment procedures for the disposition of treasury shares as restricted stock compensation, which was resolved at their Board of Directors meeting on June 26, 2025. This action involves the disposal of 4,170 shares of common stock at a price of ¥4,405 per share, amounting to a total of ¥18,368,850, and is aimed at compensating executive directors, officers, and subsidiary presidents, potentially impacting the company’s governance and stakeholder alignment.

data.description:

  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

REA Group Ltd ( (AU:REA) ) has provided an announcement.

REA Group Ltd has announced that it will release its full-year financial results for the year ending June 30, 2025, on August 6, 2025. The announcement will be accompanied by a results briefing hosted by the company’s CEO and CFO, which will be accessible via webcast. This release is significant for stakeholders as it provides insights into the company’s financial health and operational performance, potentially impacting its market positioning and investor confidence.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:REA) stock is a Buy with a A$230.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on REA Group Ltd stock, see the AU:REA Stock Forecast page.

More about REA Group Ltd

REA Group Ltd is a multinational digital advertising company specializing in property. It operates Australia’s leading residential and commercial property websites, including realestate.com.au and realcommercial.com.au, and owns various subsidiaries such as Mortgage Choice Pty Ltd and PropTrack Pty Ltd. The company also holds strategic investments in several property and fintech-related businesses both in Australia and internationally.
